{{Quote|My people would not elect someone who lost. Such a person can never run again, nor can that person ever hold a position of power. Once a loser on Gosfambling, always a loser.|[[C-Gosf]]|<ref name="The New Rebellion">''[[The New Rebellion]]''</ref>}}
'''Gosfamblings''' were a delicately-furred sentient species native to [[Gosfambling]] who were soft spoken and had whiskers. [[C-Gosf]] was a Gosfambling [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. They were wary of losers, thus if one lost any type of election, they could not run again.

{{Species-stub}}
